import React, { useState } from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; // 模拟证书数据 const certificatesData = [ { id: 1, name: "李明", course: "商业管理硕士 (MBA)", date: "2023-06-15", certificateId: "SIU-MBA-2023-001", image: "/images/logo/logo.svg" }, { id: 2, name: "张伟", course: "人工智能与数据科学", date: "2023-07-20", certificateId: "SIU-AI-2023-042", image: "/images/logo/logo.svg" }, { id: 3, name: "王芳", course: "全球卫生与医疗管理", date: "2023-05-10", certificateId: "SIU-GH-2023-019", image: "/images/logo/logo.svg" }, { id: 4, name: "赵强", course: "国际金融与投资", date: "2023-08-25", certificateId: "SIU-FIN-2023-007", image: "/images/logo/logo.svg" }, { id: 5, name: "刘洋", course: "可持续发展与环境管理", date: "2023-04-30", certificateId: "SIU-ENV-2023-015", image: "/images/logo/logo.svg" }, { id: 6, name: "陈红", course: "跨文化交流与全球公民", date: "2023-09-12", certificateId: "SIU-CC-2023-029", image: "/images/logo/logo.svg" } ]; const CertificatesPage = () => { const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState(''); const [selectedCertificate, setSelectedCertificate] = useState(null); // 搜索筛选逻辑 const filteredCertificates = certificatesData.filter(cert => cert.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()) || cert.course.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()) || cert.certificateId.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()) ); // 选择证书查看详情 const handleCertificateClick = (certificate) => { setSelectedCertificate(certificate); }; // 关闭证书详情模态框 const closeModal = () => { setSelectedCertificate(null); }; return (
{/* 标题部分 */}

证书墙

浏览我们毕业生获得的全球认可证书，每一份证书都代表了卓越的学术成就。

{/* 搜索框 */}
setSearchTerm(e.target.value)} />
{/* 证书展示区域 */}
{filteredCertificates.map((certificate) => ( ))}
{/* 无结果提示 */} {filteredCertificates.length === 0 && (

未找到匹配的证书

请尝试其他搜索关键词

)} {/* 验证证书区域 */}

验证您的证书

通过我们的在线证书验证系统，确认证书的真实性和有效性。每个证书都有唯一的识别码和区块链记录。

立即验证
{/* 证书详情模态框 */} {selectedCertificate && (
​

学生信息

姓名: {selectedCertificate.name}

证书详情

课程: {selectedCertificate.course}

颁发日期: {selectedCertificate.date}

证书ID: {selectedCertificate.certificateId}

下载证书 验证真实性
)}
); }; export default CertificatesPage;
